title: Add a Follow/Unfollow Toggle
description: Toggle the Follow button to show 'Following' with hover to 'Unfollow'.
hints: Use CSS approach with tooltip-like effect
solution: On click, toggle class 'following'. CSS: .btn-follow.following { background: #e4e6eb; color: #050505; } .btn-follow.following:hover { background: #fee2e2; color: #dc2626; } Text changes via JS.

title: Build a Photo Gallery Tab
description: Create a photo gallery view for the Photos tab with grid layout and lightbox.
requirements: Photos load in the Photos tab panel
Responsive grid (2-col on tablet, 1 on mobile)
solution: Create a grid of photos in the Photos tabpanel. Click opens a fixed overlay with the full image. Add prev/next navigation and ESC close.

title: Implement a 'Like' Animation with Counter
description: Add an animated like button with a heart animation and live counter.
solution: On click, toggle a 'liked' class. CSS: .liked { animation: heartBounce 0.3s ease; color: #e41e3f; } Use @keyframes for scale transform. Update count text.
